reviews.review_title: Has potential but not there yet
reviews.review_description: This game for free or less than $5.00 is just right to pick up. It is in early access, but there's not much to it so far.  The basic game is very similar to other racing games I own.  Right now, it is single player only and you try to beat your own score and the bot's time. Beat bot 1 you move onto bot 2 and so one until you beat all 20 bots.  Problems with steering.  Your arms tire from being held out and eventually one droops so now you're holding them uneven causing problems.  Getting the hands to let go of the wheel can be problematic also. Hands sometimes won't release for many seconds.  Getting the car to go in reverse using that tiny button on the wheel is the biggest problem this game has as well as then getting it back into drive after doing so.

I cannot play this game because it has completely broken itself, my hands never stop pointing and I cannot grab the wheel. Clearly the devs don't actually care or understand the issue as they treat everyone who complains about it like they're complete idiots. Redoing the tutorial does not fix anything. Do not support this game or the devs if this game ever comes out of early access unless they seriously change their approach to how they treat players.

reviews.review_title: Everyone who wrote a negative review:
reviews.review_description: I thought yall were right about the controls but I tried thumbstick driving and it worked perfectly so there you go, enjoy f1 people

But when I got it my game said that I hade had paid for the game and I started freaking out because I can’t pay for it but then I realized that it did not pay me but everything else aside. It is very good

Grip is ah, no team raido

.

reviews.review_title: Great Game but needs a few tweaks
reviews.review_description: First of all I lose traction a lot and u also feel like im drifting. Second, there's no races. Lastly, multiplayer would be nice. But overall love the game controls are smooth and this game has potential.
The game is fun but the handling of the cars are to hard when you turn your car spins out of control and its hard to go in reverse when stuck on a wall
Was enjoying the game for a few weeks but now I can't grab the steering wheel anymore like others have mentioned. Hope it gets fixed.
Electric is so different to race!

reviews.review_title: Problems I experience with the AI cars
reviews.review_description: Ive been playing this game for a while now and I've noticed that the AI cars seem to have a lot of downforce and grip from a certain point. I try to beat them but if i follow the exact lines and speed I slip out of the corner. It just seems a bit impossible if they go so fast through a corner that I slip out of. Also in the last straight to the finish it seems that the AI car is way faster than my car wich makes it even more difficult. Great game though, would love more maps or customisation to the car.

developer_response.body: Hi Louitje, thank you for trying Project E and for your feedback on the gameplay.

reviews.review_description: Good i love race games 🍇🍇🍇
the triggers Won't grab the steering wheel.

developer_response.body:
Hi ncaissie,
Thank you for trying the game and for your feedback. Please restart the game and follow the Controls Tutorial, which will talk you through every step of using the steering wheel. Let us know if you enjoy the game! Thanks!

reviews.review_description: this game is brilliant for formula e fans because there is not many games that have any formula e aspects, and this game is free! but the track selection is poor. Please consider adding more tracks. i have noticed that the steering is off, my left hand has to be higher than my right hand in order for the steering wheel to be even. Another cool feature would be multiplayer or full on races with bots. Customisation would also be cool to have, also tuning the engine or other parts with a form of in game currency. One final suggestion is pit stops.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your appreciation. Keep playing the game!

reviews.review_description: can you guys add ABS - anti braking system.  Because when your in a sharp and high speed corner, that you need to break hard. But because this game doesn't have abs. The Wheel locks up and the Formula E car (I think its Formula E) loses control and spins. Or you can add TC  - traction control. I understand that its hard to add ABS. But either way I will still play your AMAZING GAME, actually that is a understatement. It IS A WONDERFULL  racing game!

developer_response.body: Hi Moustique99, and thank you for trying Project E and for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: It’s just good
can't turn without spinning out tracking is weird

developer_response.body: Hey, you've got incredible power under the seat! We recommend that you keep trying and press the accelerator gradually.

reviews.review_title: awesome, but there is a problem.
reviews.review_description: The mechanics, detail, graphics, and UI elements are great, but if you try to turn your wheel too far, it glitches out and makes it so you go the exact opposite way.

developer_response.body: Hi spaghettilover! thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: For free its really great!

developer_response.body:
Hi Sam6664,
We're glad you're enjoying the speed! Thank you!

reviews.review_description: If you are an f1 fan this game is 100 percent for you. The driving mechanics are very good, one thing that would make this game a whole lot better is if you could race online or add a few more tracks.

developer_response.body: Hi Omarxa, thanks for your review and for enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: Ok
Basically there is absolute nothing but driving

reviews.review_title: Best free game on the App Store
reviews.review_description: This game has the best car graphics now I wish they would make an F1 version of this please with more tracks and multiplayer then you got the best game in the world PS this game is underrated.

developer_response.body: Hi Elon, Thanks for your feedback, we're thrilled that you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: Amazing Car Graphics (Map Graphics could be better though), super fun and even though it’s repetitive it’s balanced by the bot getting harder and harder, I would love to see where they take this game in the future and a request would be to add multiplayer please (PS: If you can’t steer your car/grab the steering wheel restart your game)

developer_response.body: Hello, and thank you for trying out Project E and for your feedback. See you soon.

reviews.review_description: Ive been looking for a good vr racing game, that wasnt super unrealistic, and this fits the bill. The only thing i would like is thumbstick support, and racing other people in real time. i have a racing wheel that inputs with the thumbstick and it would boost the immersion so much.

developer_response.body: Hi Cloudybeanz. Thanks a lot for your appreciation!

reviews.review_description: Content matches required space (small size), so far one car, one track, but concept seems good. Minus 1 star for weird controller bug, where i had to have controllers like if i was turning 30° to drive straight after a lap or two. If developer continues to add content and fixes controller bug then it should be fine.

developer_response.body: Hey Laada! Thank you so much for the feedback. We'll let our team know about your experience with the controllers.

reviews.review_description:
Good efford so far but it feels like the car drifts a lot around corners. 
Could be nice to have a mini-map of the track with a moving dot to help predict the turns.

developer_response.body: Hello, and thank you for trying Project E and for your feedback. See you soon.

reviews.review_description: Ita a 7/10 game but if you just update it and add new cars/skin and maps and stuff its got really good potentiol i wanna be able to come back in 2 years and see how much its changed keep it up

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for trying out the game!

reviews.review_description: This game is brilliant, when is the full version out?
Can’t even drive I’m stuck on the pointer fingers

developer_response.body:
Hi Hornzt,
Thank you for trying out the game! I suggest restarting the game and trying again. If the problem happens again, please take a screenshot showing where you are on the track when it stops and send it to info@sandboxgames.it. Please keep me informed as to whether you are able to play, and what your impressions of the driving experience are. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: It doesn't work. After getting on the track, the car stops and I can't move or do anything... and I'd like to play. What should I do with it? Maybe some instructions.

If the problem happens again, please take a screenshot showing where you are on the track when it stops.
